title: Create: Bits 'n' Tracks
description: This mod will allow you to make tracks with a belt/chain system from the Bits 'n' Bobs mod! Wow!
body:
**IMPORTANT DEPENDENCY INFORMATION**
To use this mod, you need a specific build of *Create: Bits 'n' Bobs*. The version from Modrinth/CurseForge (0.0.44 and below) **will not work**.
Instead, please download the compatible, pre-compiled .jar file directly from GitHub releases:
 **[Bits 'n' Bobs](https://github.com/qwxon/Create-Bits-n-Bobs-for-Tracks/releases)**

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd528f87816bf4e4edb4fdc369e16d02924c62b9.png)

*(Note: Create: Bits 'n' Tracks is still in the testing stage; bugs may occur).*

### **Bits ’n’ Tracks**

The main tool of the mod is the **Cog Alignment Tool**. It allows players to adjust cogwheel placement after installation, hide visible cogwheels, reset cogwheel settings, and enable suspension-style physics for supported builds. This makes it easier to line up tracks, tune vehicle movement, and clean up the final look of a build without constantly breaking and replacing blocks.

### **Main Features**

* **Track-focused cogwheels** in several sizes.
* **Industrial cogwheel variants** *(Models are based on the Industrial Cogwheels from the Create: Gears n' Kinetics mod).*
* **Hidden cogwheels** for cleaner builds.
* **Cog Alignment Tool** for shifting, hiding, resetting, and tuning cogwheels.
* **Suspension-style physics** support for tracked vehicles.
* **Configurable** physics and movement settings.
